name: polymath-connector-asana
description: Asana connector: MCP for projects/tasks/sections + asana-task-update skill that moves a task across sections + sets custom fields by ID, not name.

asanaToken.title: Asana personal access token
asanaToken.description: From Asana → My Profile Settings → Apps → Developer apps. Service-account scope preferred over user.

asanaWorkspaceId.title: Default Asana workspace GID
asanaWorkspaceId.description: Workspace GID for default project lookups (Asana's workspace API ID, not the URL slug).
